visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor kitchen setting. A man in a white t-shirt (Cai Aga) expresses shock with wide eyes and open mouth while holding a white tablet and a blue pen. To his left, another person's arm wearing a beaded bracelet is visible. The background is a white tiled wall with some decorative plants on shelves. (2) Inside a food production facility. Two men in full white cleanroom gear (suits, caps, and clear masks) stand side-by-side. The man on the right (WanWan Liang owner) gestures while talking, and the man on the left (Cai Aga) smiles broadly. (3) A woman in a cleanroom suit (Erbo) is featured in a medium shot, smiling and talking animatedly while looking off-camera. She raises her hands in a playful gesture. (4) Three people in cleanroom suits are gathered around a workspace. The woman in the center is actively kneading a piece of dough, while the two men watch and laugh. (5) Back in the kitchen, a man (WanWan Liang owner) speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face. On the left, Cai Aga is shown from the side, holding chopsticks and eating a dumpling. (6) Cai Aga is shown in a medium shot, holding a small white product box and pointing a single finger as if making a key point. He looks impressed. Plates of cooked dumplings are arranged on the counter in front of him. (7) The WanWan Liang owner gestures with both hands as he explains the product. He wears a red logo on his white t-shirt. (8) A close-up shot of a bowl of beef noodles featuring large chunks of meat, green vegetables, and noodles in a dark broth. (9) The man holds the bowl of beef noodles up to the camera, using chopsticks to lift a piece of meat to show its texture. (10) Cai Aga is shown reacting with pure joy and laughter, raising a hand while holding a bowl of noodles. (11) Both men stand together in the kitchen, cheering and gesturing towards the camera with high energy. (12) The WanWan Liang owner speaks his closing remarks, gesturing with open palms towards the viewers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你不知道股份20%. [Slogan]: 給對方嗎?! (2) [Subtitle]: 剛出來的時候. [Subtitle]: 很多人都會罵我們說. [Variety]: 皮很厚!! (3) [Variety]: (說什麼大實話😅). [Variety]: 真的!!! (4) [Subtitle]: 之前那時候好像有拿到業配. [Subtitle]: 我們吃完就想說. [Subtitle]: 呃... [Variety]: 沒關係:) (5) [Subtitle]: 後來又再吃. [Variety]: 又不一樣了!. [Variety]: 真的. (6) [Subtitle]: 欸我覺得. [Subtitle]: 二伯捏得比你好欸. (7) [Subtitle]: 姊可以來上班嗎. [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈哈哈. (8) [Subtitle]: 植物肉有這麼好吃. [Subtitle]: 因為是萬萬兩做的. (9) [Subtitle]: 我的第一名一定是來啦. [Logo]: 嘎哥.二伯第一名. [Slogan]: 阿根廷天使紅蝦豬肉餃子. (10) [Subtitle]: 很鮮對不對. [Subtitle]: 這個太厲害了. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是我們去KTV一定會吃水餃. [Subtitle]: 會吃牛肉麵. [Subtitle]: 我們是還原了唱歌的那一碗牛肉麵. (12) [Logo]: 萬萬兩. [Slogan]: 紅燒酸菜雙拼牛肉麵. [Slogan]: K歌必點味. [Subtitle]: 這個肉量很誇張欸. (13) [Subtitle]: 這是雙寶啊. [Subtitle]: 牛筋. [Subtitle]: 花腱肉. (14) [Variety]: 喔～溫潤啊～. [Subtitle]: 服務鈴要按一下嗎. (15) [Subtitle]: 幫我叫一手. (16) [Subtitle]: 剛剛20位再加碼幾碗. [Subtitle]: 加碼10碗牛肉麵. [Variety]: 耶~~~~! (17) [Subtitle]: 謝謝大家收看. [Subtitle]: 那如果你喜歡這集影片的話. [Subtitle]: 按讚 訂閱 小鈴鐺. [Subtitle]: 還有把這支影片分享給你. [Subtitle]: 所有的朋友.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host (Cai Aga), 1 female host (Erbo), 1 brand owner (WanWan Liang), and 1 background worker in the factory.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main hosts wear casual white t-shirts and cleanroom suits in factory scenes. The brand owner wears a branded white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a modern, bright white kitchen with minimalist shelving and a clean, industrial food manufacturing facility with professional equipment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched male voice speaking rapidly with an excited and shocked tone. Background music is upbeat with a fast tempo. An electronic "pop" sound effect punctuates the speech. (2) Conversational voices with moderate volume. Loud, genuine laughter from a male speaker dominates. The background music continues with a steady, rhythmic beat. (3) A female voice speaks with high arousal and a cheerful tone, frequently interrupted by her own laughter. Ambient factory hum is audible but very low. (4) Multiple voices laughing simultaneously. The sound of dough being kneaded is faintly audible under the vocals. (5) A male voice speaks in a neutral, informative tone. A distinct slurping sound effect is heard as someone eats. (6) High-energy male narration with sharp inflections. The BGM swells slightly in volume during pauses. (7) Clear, professional-sounding male voice explaining details. No significant ambient noise. (8) A loud, exaggerated slurping sound effect, followed by a "ding" sound effect indicating a positive reaction. (9) Detailed vocal description from a male speaker with a friendly and enthusiastic tone. (10) Burst of high-arousal laughter and a loud, energetic exclamation. A comedic "whoosh" SFX transitions the segment. (11) High-volume cheering and shouting from multiple male voices. The music beat becomes more prominent with heavy bass. (12) Energetic outro speech with consistent pacing and a warm tone. The BGM fades out gradually towards the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Behind-the-scenes -> Product Tasting -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'WanWan Liang' brand dumplings and beef noodles by showing their production process and positive taste reactions from popular YouTubers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear product showing, brand owner appearance, and direct promotion of the food quality.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal social media editing style to maintain engagement for product promotion.
